## Migration Note

The detailed security content has been consolidated into the main README.md to:
- Reduce documentation drift
- Provide single source of truth
- Improve maintainability
- Make security model easier to find

**Previous content:** This file previously contained detailed threat model, attack vectors, and mitigations. All unique content has been merged into README.md's Security Model section with enhanced organization.

**History preserved:** Original content is available in git history if needed for reference.
